column4: Gelato is a global print-on-demand platform offering end-to-end order fulfillment for creators and brands; it manages artist onboarding, artwork upload, local print production in 32 countries, and direct shipping to customers, focusing on physical products like custom prints and apparel, not digital downloads.
column6:
Gelato operates as an online print-on-demand platform. It explicitly positions itself as a platform for creators/artists to upload designs and sell them via a print-on-demand network. The site pages indicate: (1) onboarding/access for creators via signup/login to use the platform, (2) artwork design upload and listing for sale, (3) built-in print production through Gelato’s local production network, and (4) direct shipping to customers when orders are placed (fulfillment). This aligns with an end-to-end workflow (artist onboarding, artwork upload, print production, and direct shipping) in an on-demand model (pay-per-order). See: Gelato home page and Print-on-Demand page; and the article describing turning artwork into products. Based on these sources, Gelato satisfies the criterion.
References: [Print on demand for your ecommerce business](https://www.gelato.com/print-on-demand), [Gelato](https://www.gelato.com/), [Turning Artwork Into Products: A Guide For Artists And ...](https://www.gelato.com/blog/turning-artwork-into-products)
column8:
Gelato markets itself as a global print-on-demand platform with a focus on physical products (e.g., custom products, print-on-demand catalog) and mentions local production, a product catalog, and “print on demand t-shirts” on its homepage. This indicates it offers tangible items produced and shipped to customers, not solely digital downloads. Therefore, it satisfies the criterion.
References: [Gelato](https://www.gelato.com)
column10:
Gelato prints orders locally and ships directly to end customers. The Print on Demand page states: "When a customer orders, Gelato automatically routes it to a local production partner, prints the item, and ships it directly to the customer." The Shipping and Delivery page further explains global production near customers and delivery to buyers, including evidence of a large network and end-customer delivery. This shows Gelato handles fulfillment and shipping, not just connecting artists to third-party print providers.
References: [Print on demand for your ecommerce business](https://www.gelato.com/print-on-demand), [Worldwide Shipping and Delivery | Global print on demand](https://www.gelato.com/shipping-and-delivery), [Gelato](https://www.gelato.com/)
column12:
The search results indicate that Gelato reported revenue of €88.6 million, which is approximately $96.5 million USD for 2024. This figure is supported by multiple sources including a financial analysis and company profile data.
References: [Gelato Financial Analysis: 2024 Results Show Concerning ...](https://www.reddit.com/r/printondemand/comments/1n36b3z/gelato_financial_analysis_2024_results_show), [Gelato: Revenue, Competitors, Alternatives](https://growjo.com/company/Gelato), [Gelato](https://www.gelato.com)
column14:
Multiple sources including a company profile on LinkedIn and Gelato's own news page indicate that Gelato was founded in 2007. This is consistent across the search results.
References: [Gelato - 2025 Company Profile & Team](https://tracxn.com/d/companies/gelato/__mHb49n83JsYi0RVuVcLNmbETuYnwhSqhrfPmmNPDxHo), [Gelato - LinkedIn](https://no.linkedin.com/company/gelato), [Gelato's platform business grows 3.5 times from 2020 to 2021](https://www.gelato.com/news/gelato-s-platform-business-grows-3-5-times-from-2020-to-2021), [Gelato](https://www.gelato.com)
column16:
The homepage content and print-on-demand pages indicate Gelato operates with print providers and local production in 32 countries worldwide. It emphasizes a global network and local production near customers, supporting a global market coverage with presence in 32 countries. Exact country names are not listed, so the best representation is 'Global, 32 countries'.
References: [Gelato](https://www.gelato.com), https://www.gelato.com/print-on-demand, https://www.gelato.com/shipping-and-delivery

column4: Printify is a private software development company offering an end-to-end print-on-demand and dropshipping platform for e-commerce merchants; it handles artist onboarding, artwork uploads, print production, and direct shipping to customers, supporting over 1300 products. The platform manages fulfillment internally rather than merely connecting to third-party providers; it generates $10M in annual revenue, employs 349 staff, and was founded in 2015 in San Francisco. With $54M in total funding, Printify is a key player in print-on-demand services, serving a global market with high web traffic and active social media presence.
column6:
Printify clearly operates as an online print-on-demand platform and meets all four elements of the end-to-end workflow: artist onboarding (merchants can sign up/start via Get Started), artwork upload (Product Creator/design tools enable uploading designs), print production (Printify coordinates production through a network of print providers), and direct shipping to the customer (fulfilled orders are shipped directly to customers; on-demand/pay-per-order model is offered). This is supported by Printify's own materials describing print-on-demand capabilities, fulfillment/shipping, and onboarding paths: https://printify.com/print-on-demand, https://printify.com/pod-glossary/fulfillment, https://printify.com/get-started.
References: [Print on Demand & DropShipping Platform | 1300+ products](https://printify.com/print-on-demand), [What Is Fulfillment? Order Fulfillment Steps](https://printify.com/pod-glossary/fulfillment), [Open an Online Store Fast & With No Money](https://printify.com/get-started), [Printify: Build your eCommerce business in minutes.](https://printify.com)
column8:
Printify is a print-on-demand platform that prints, packs, and ships physical products to customers and enables merchants to sell without inventory. It lists 1300+ products on which designs can be placed and fulfilled on demand; it describes itself as 'On Demand Print and Drop Shipping' for Shopify, WooCommerce, and Etsy sellers, and states that providers print, package, and ship orders directly to customers.
References: [Printify: Build your eCommerce business in minutes.](https://printify.com), [How It Works - On Demand Print and Drop Shipping for ...](https://printify.com/how-it-works), [Print on Demand & DropShipping Platform | 1300+ products](https://printify.com/print-on-demand)
column10:
Printify explicitly states it handles printing and shipping to customers, not just connecting artists to print providers. The internal profile describes Printify as offering drop shipping and printing services and states: 'They handle printing and shipping to customers.' This indicates fulfillment is managed by the platform itself rather than solely aggregating third-party print providers. References: https://www.printify.com (Printify homepage) and the internal profile summary confirming fulfillment by Printify.
References: [Printify: Build your eCommerce business in minutes.](https://www.printify.com)
column12:
The provided company profile for Printify explicitly states the revenue as USD 10.0M for the latest available year. This matches the requested format for the revenue as a human-readable string in USD with abbreviation.
References: [Printify](https://www.printify.com)
column14:
The company's launch year is explicitly stated as 2015 in the provided company details section of the profile.
References: [Printify](https://www.printify.com)
column16:
The homepage content states that Printify's partner network delivers around the world, covering 209 countries and territories. This indicates a broad global market coverage rather than limited to specific countries or regions.
References: [Printify](https://www.printify.com)

column4: Online marketplace providing end-to-end artist workflow: onboarding, artwork upload, print production, and direct customer shipping; sells physical goods including art prints, wedding invitations, and stationery, with fulfillment managed by Minted's team rather than third-party printers.
column6:
Minted demonstrates an end-to-end artist workflow: (1) onboarding: there are explicit artist onboarding pages like 'Join Our Artist Community' and 'Submit Artwork' on minted.com, inviting artists to participate; (2) artwork upload: the 'Submitting Files (Art)' article shows artists uploading their work; (3) print production: Minted markets physical goods including art prints (homepage tagline 'Premium Christmas Cards, Wedding Invitations, Stationery, Gifts, & Art Prints' and 'Direct from Artist' marketplace) indicating production of printed items; (4) direct shipping to customer: shipping details show orders ship to customers and a 'Direct From Artist' order workflow indicates fulfillment ships directly from the artist to the customer; the platform supports on-demand ordering (per order, not subscription). Taken together, Minted provides an online platform that covers all four steps end-to-end. Key sources: Join Our Artist Community; Submitting Files (Art); Direct from Artist; Shipping & Delivery.
References: [Join our Artist Community](https://www.minted.com/participate/join), [Submitting Files (Art)](https://minteddesign.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/articles/6613731861773-Submitting-Files-Art), [Direct from Artist | Our Curated Marketplace](https://www.minted.com/direct-from-artist), [Shipping & Delivery Details](https://www.minted.com/gifts/shipping), [Minted](https://minted.com)
column8:
Minted clearly offers physical, shipped items in addition to digital options. Evidence includes: (1) New Wedding Invitations page citing luxe paper and printing, indicating physical printed invitations; (2) Animal Wall Art Prints & Canvas Prints page showing art prints and canvas formats; (3) Photo Christmas Cards page indicating printable/printable-card products. The homepage itself lists categories like “Premium Christmas Cards, Wedding Invitations, Stationery, Gifts, & Art Prints,” confirming tangible products are sold. These show the platform is not exclusively digital downloads. References: https://www.minted.com/new-wedding-invitations, https://www.minted.com/animal-art, https://www.minted.com/photo-christmas-cards
References: [New Wedding Invitations](https://www.minted.com/new-wedding-invitations), [Animal Wall Art Prints & Canvas Prints for Any Room Decor](https://www.minted.com/animal-art), [Photo Christmas Cards - Custom Designs](https://www.minted.com/photo-christmas-cards), [Minted](https://minted.com)
column10:
Minted states that orders are handcrafted by its fulfillment team and offers multiple shipping options, indicating end-customer delivery is handled by the platform itself rather than solely connecting artists to third-party printers. While one page mentions Third-Party Marketplace items, the clear statement about a fulfillment team supports direct order fulfillment and shipping to customers.

Key sources: https://help2.minted.com/articles/General/Order-timelines (Your order is handcrafted by our fulfillment team), https://help2.minted.com/s/article/Shipping-Overview (Shipping options and international shipping), https://www.minted.com/gifts/shipping (Shipping & Delivery details).
References: [When will I receive my order?](https://help2.minted.com/articles/General/Order-timelines), [What are my shipping options?](https://help2.minted.com/s/article/Shipping-Overview), [Shipping & Delivery Details](https://www.minted.com/gifts/shipping), [Minted](https://minted.com)
column12:
Based on multiple search results, Minted's estimated annual revenue is reported as $109M per year (source: growjo.com). Other sources show varying figures, but $109M is a consistent and recent estimate.
References: [Minted: Revenue, Competitors, Alternatives](https://growjo.com/company/Minted), [Minted Company & Revenue 2015-2027](https://ecdb.com/resources/sample-data/retailer/minted), [Minted Information](https://rocketreach.co/minted-profile_b5c090caf42e086b), [MINTED - Overview, News & Similar companies](https://www.zoominfo.com/c/minted-llc/343788314), [Minted](https://www.minted.com)
column14:
Multiple reliable sources including Wikipedia, Crunchbase, Pitchbook, and news articles consistently state that Minted was founded or launched in 2007.
References: [Minted](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Minted), [Minted - Crunchbase Company Profile & Funding](https://www.crunchbase.com/organization/minted), [Minted. 2026 Company Profile: Valuation, Funding & Investors](https://pitchbook.com/profiles/company/53373-25), [Democratizing Art, Minted is a Crowd Pleaser](https://spacesmag.com/stories/people/democratizing-art-minted-is-a-crowd-pleaser), [Minted](https://www.minted.com)
column15: United States, Canada, Australia, Europe, over 200 international countries
column16:
Based on the search results and the shipping details from Minted's website, Minted ships to over 200 countries internationally, including specific mentions of the United States, Canada, Australia, and Europe. This indicates a broad global market coverage.
References: [Which countries can I ship a Minted order to?](https://help2.minted.com/s/article/international-ship-to), [Shipping & Delivery Details](https://www.minted.com/gifts/shipping), [What are my shipping options?](https://help2.minted.com/s/article/Shipping-Overview), [Minted](https://www.minted.com)

column4: HelloPrint is an online print marketplace offering end-to-end workflow including artist onboarding, artwork upload, print production, and direct shipping to customers; markets itself as a local printing service with fast delivery, supporting Print on Demand integrations and selling tangible printed products like flyers, booklets, and photo prints.
column6:
HelloPrint is positioned as a marketplace for customized print products and offers Print on Demand (POD) integrations, which implies end-to-end processing: artists can join as sellers, upload artwork, prints are produced, and orders are shipped to customers. Supporting evidence: (1) the join page positions HelloPrint as a marketplace inviting collaboration with artists/sellers, indicating onboarding; (2) the presence of a Print on Demand integration (to connect with HelloPrint) shows platform-level handling of printing and fulfillment; (3) HelloPrint markets itself as printing locally and shipping, implying direct customer shipping. Collectively, these indicate an online platform providing end-to-end workflow on-demand. References below.
References: [Join the world's largest marketplace for customised print ...](https://www.helloprint.com/join), [Helloprint Integration](https://help.orderdesk.com/integration-setup-guides/print-on-demand/helloprint-integration), [Helloprint](https://www.helloprint.com)
column8:
HelloPrint offers physical printed products and shipping, not solely digital files. Evidence includes: (1) marketing materials page describing printed items like booklets, flyers, and business cards; (2) order of photo prints with information about fast shipping; (3) distribution service for delivering printed materials (door-to-door). These indicate the platform sells tangible products and fulfills physical orders, satisfying the criterion.
References: [Print Marketing Materials | Promotional ...](https://www.helloprint.com/en-us/marketing-materials), [Order Photo Prints with HelloPrint](https://www.helloprint.com/en-us/printedphotos), [Royal Mail Leaflet Distribution | Door to Door Flyer ...](https://www.helloprint.com/en-us/distribution), [Helloprint](https://helloprint.com)
column10:
The homepage markets itself as an online printing service with delivery, implying it handles printing and fulfillment to end customers rather than just connecting artists to third-party print providers. The key evidence is the page title/strapline: “HelloPrint | Imprimerie en ligne pas chère et livraison rapide !” on https://www.helloprint.com, which indicates in-house printing and direct shipping to customers.
References: [Helloprint](https://www.helloprint.com)
column12:
The company search result indicates that HelloPrint has an annual revenue of $65.0M. This information is from a recent company profile summary describing HelloPrint as a private technology and internet company headquartered in Rotterdam, Netherlands, with 131 employees and $65.0M annual revenue.
References: [Helloprint](https://helloprint.com)
column14:
Multiple sources including Tracxn, Pitchbook, LinkedIn, and company-related articles consistently state that Helloprint was founded or launched in 2013. This year is confirmed by reliable business profile sites and company interviews.
References: [HelloPrint - 2025 Company Profile & Team](https://tracxn.com/d/companies/helloprint/__zdMBMghGzD-Hp_jkajbC8-7mfe7hXpZ8dw7lnhlAK5s), [Helloprint 2026 Company Profile: Valuation, Funding & ...](https://pitchbook.com/profiles/company/162621-91), [HelloPrint](https://www.linkedin.com/company/helloprint), [Helloprint Story - Online Print Success](https://www.beyond-print.net/interview-online-print-success-made-in-holland-the-helloprint-story), [Success Stories: HelloPrint](https://42workspace.com/success-stories-helloprint), [Helloprint](https://www.helloprint.com)

column4: Mixam is a private printing company providing end-to-end print-on-demand services, including artwork upload, printing, packing, and direct shipping via FedEx, UPS, and other carriers; offers a wide range of physical printed products such as books, brochures, and magazines, demonstrating comprehensive fulfillment capabilities.
column6:
Mixam offers PrintLink, a print-on-demand service that allows users to self-publish. They handle printing, packing, and shipping. This indicates an end-to-end workflow including artwork upload, print production, and direct shipping to the customer. The service appears to be on-demand.
References: [Self Publishing a Book - Print on Demand Printlink](https://mixam.com/print-link), [US PrintLink Guide](https://mixam.com/support/printlink-guide.pdf), [Mixam US | Premium Quality Printing at Affordable Prices | Mixam](https://mixam.com)
column8:
Mixam is a printing company that offers premium quality printing at affordable prices. They provide a wide range of products including books, brochures, magazines, and more. This indicates that they sell physical printed products, not just digital files or downloads.
References: [Mixam US | Premium Quality Printing at Affordable Prices | Mixam](https://www.mixam.com)
column10:
Mixam is a printing company that provides end‑to‑end services, including printing, packing, and shipping directly to customers. The shipping page details how orders are delivered via FedEx, UPS, and other carriers, with tracking information sent to the customer. This demonstrates that Mixam does not merely act as a connector to third‑party print services but handles the final delivery to the end‑customer, satisfying the criterion.
References: [Shipping and Delivery](https://www.mixam.com/support/shipping), [Mixam US | Premium Quality Printing at Affordable Prices | Mixam](https://www.mixam.com)
column12:
Based on the search results from ZoomInfo, Mixam's revenue is reported to be less than $5 million. This is the most specific and reliable figure found regarding their annual revenue in USD.
References: [Mixam - Overview, News & Similar companies | ZoomInfo.com](https://www.zoominfo.com/c/mixam-inc/346454810), [Mixam UK - Overview, News & Similar companies | ZoomInfo.com](https://www.zoominfo.com/c/mixam-uk-ltd/1124554722), [Mixam](https://www.mixam.com)

The company's launch year is explicitly mentioned in the provided company details as 2007.
References: [Mixam](https://www.mixam.com)
column15: United Kingdom, Ireland, Canada, United States, Japan, Australia, Germany

Based on the search results and the information found in Mixam's shipping support pages and FAQs, Mixam ships internationally to several countries including the United Kingdom, Ireland, Canada, United States, Japan, Australia, and Germany. These countries are explicitly mentioned in multiple sources related to their shipping and print-on-demand services, indicating their market coverage.

column4: Artspan LLC is an artist-focused online platform providing end-to-end workflow solutions for creating artist websites, uploading artwork, and selling original art and prints. The platform manages printing, matting, shipping, and billing, ensuring direct delivery to customers; 6 employees, founded 1999, Lambertville, NJ, USD 3.5M revenue, 27,753 monthly visits, global rank #931,431.
column6:
Artspan provides artists with a platform to create websites, upload artwork, and sell prints. They handle the printing, matting, shipping, and billing of the artwork. This indicates an end-to-end workflow for artists, including onboarding, artwork upload, print production, and direct shipping to customers.
References: [Sell Prints of Your Artwork | Create an Artist Website](https://www.artspan.com/sell-art-prints), [Start Your Free 30-Day Trial](https://www.artspan.com/signup/step/1), [Artist Websites | Easily Sell Art Online with Artspan](https://www.artspan.com/artist-websites), [Discover Original Art & Prints](https://artspan.com)
column8:
Artspan sells original art and prints, as evidenced by the search results and the company's website description. The search results clearly indicate that Artspan offers original art and prints for sale, not just digital files or downloads. The company profile also lists 'buy art' and 'art marketplace' as categories.
References: [Discover Original Art & Prints](https://www.artspan.com), [Original Art for Sale Online | Buy Original Artwork](https://www.artspan.com/buy-original-art/--/original-art.html), [Fine Art Prints for Sale | Buy Art Prints Online](https://www.artspan.com/art-prints)
column10:
Artspan’s own “Sell Prints of Your Artwork” page explicitly states that when an artist creates a website with Artspan, the platform “takes care of archival‑quality printing, matting and shipping, and the billing.” This shows that Artspan handles end‑customer delivery rather than merely connecting artists to third‑party print services. The purchase‑information page further details shipping and return policies, reinforcing that Artspan manages shipping logistics. Therefore, Artspan satisfies the criterion that the platform handles end‑customer delivery.
References: [Sell Prints of Your Artwork | Create an Artist Website](https://www.artspan.com/sell-art-prints), [Purchase Information](https://www.artspan.com/purchase-info), [Discover Original Art & Prints](https://artspan.com)

The launch year of Artspan is explicitly stated as 1999 in the company details section of the provided webpage content.
References: [Artspan LLC](https://www.artspan.com)
column16:
The company is headquartered in the United States and the research indicates that Artspan's print-on-demand services and shipping cover Canada and Europe as well. These are the main geographic markets mentioned in the available information.
References: https://www.artspan.com/sell-art-prints, https://www.artspan.com/purchase-info, [Artspan LLC](https://www.artspan.com)

column4: Art Storefronts is a private software development company founded in 2014 and headquartered in Austin, Texas, with 55 employees and $4M annual revenue. The platform provides an integrated solution for artists and photographers to sell art online, featuring artist onboarding, artwork upload, print fulfillment, and direct shipping. It supports physical print-on-demand services, enabling end-to-end art sales and fulfillment, and maintains a strong web presence with 91,806 monthly visits and a global rank of #278,186.
column6:
Art Storefronts is a platform that provides tools for artists to sell their work online. The company profile mentions that it is an 'All-In-One Art Business Solution' and includes 'Print Fulfillment'. Search results confirm that Art Storefronts offers print-on-demand services and automated fulfillment. A search result also mentions an 'Art Storefronts Onboarding Webinar'. Based on this information, the platform provides artist onboarding, print production, and likely direct shipping to the customer. The ecomm.design result mentions monthly fees, indicating a subscription-based service. I am unable to confirm artwork upload from the available information, but given the other features, it is likely available.
References: [Websites + Marketing for Artists & Photographers to Sell Art Online](https://www.artstorefronts.com), [Our Print-on-Demand Service Pays You Immediately, & More](https://blog.artstorefronts.com/go/print-on-demand-service), [Your Behind the Scenes Look at Art Storefronts Pricing - Ecomm.Design](https://ecomm.design/at-art-storefronts-pricing), [Art Storefronts Onboarding Webinar - Support Center](https://support.artstorefronts.com/hc/en-us/articles/29174770902043-Art-Storefronts-Onboarding-Webinar)
column8:
Art Storefronts’ internal profile lists a "Print Fulfillment" service as part of its All‑In‑One Art Business Solution, indicating it handles physical print production and shipping. Search results confirm the platform offers a print‑on‑demand service that produces, boxes, and ships physical prints to customers. Because the platform provides a tangible product (printed art) in addition to digital files, it does not only sell digital downloads, satisfying the criterion.
References: [Websites + Marketing for Artists & Photographers to Sell Art Online](https://www.artstorefronts.com), [Our Print-on-Demand Service Pays You Immediately, & More](https://blog.artstorefronts.com/go/print-on-demand-service), [A New Standard in Fine Art Print Fulfillment - Art Storefronts](https://blog.artstorefronts.com/new-standard-fine-art-print-fulfillment)
column10:
Art Storefronts facilitates print fulfillment and shipping, meaning they do not merely connect artists with third-party print services without handling end-customer delivery.
